title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
